title: vfx-simple
description: A simple shader to work perfectly with keeping the vanilla vibe
body:
# VFX Simple – Beta Build

*A lightweight shader pack by BunnyCrop Studios that enhances Minecraft’s visuals without sacrificing performance.*

## 🎥 Showcase

<video src="https://i.imgur.com/BL0HzPV.mp4" controls></video>

## ✨ Features

### Enhanced Lighting & Shadows
- Soft dynamic shadows that add depth to your world
- Improved entity shadows with reduced glitching
- Subtle ambient occlusion for realistic depth perception
- Warm glow from light sources with gentle flickering

### Vegetation Waving
- Trees, flowers, and crops sway dynamically in the wind

### Particle Enhancements
- Improved particle rendering and effects
- Better integration of particles with the environment

### Performance Optimization
- Built with performance in mind
- Minimal impact on gameplay FPS
- Compatible with a wide range of hardware

## 📋 Installation

1. Install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Iris Shaders](https://irisshaders.net/download) for your Minecraft version
2. Download the VFX Simple shader pack
3. Place the downloaded `.zip` file into your `.minecraft/shaderpacks` folder
4. Launch Minecraft with OptiFine or Iris
5. Go to **Options → Video Settings → Shaders**
6. Select **“VFX Simple – Beta Build”** from the list

## 🔧 Compatibility

- Works with Minecraft **1.16.5 and above**
- Requires OptiFine or a compatible shader loader
- Compatible with most popular Minecraft mods

## 💻 Performance

VFX Simple is designed to be lightweight while still providing beautiful visuals. It should run smoothly on mid-range hardware, though performance may vary depending on your setup.

**Recommended Specifications:**
- **GPU:** GTX 1050 or equivalent (or integrated graphics with 2GB+ VRAM)
- **CPU:** Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 3 or better
- **RAM:** 8GB+

## 🚧 Beta Notice

This is a beta build of VFX Simple. While we’ve worked hard to ensure stability, you may still encounter occasional visual glitches or performance issues. We’re actively improving the pack and welcome your feedback!

## 🔮 Future Plans

- Additional atmospheric effects
- Enhanced water rendering
- Further performance optimizations
- Extended compatibility with more Minecraft versions

---

*VFX Simple – Beta Build by BunnyCrop Studios*
